full_text:
Liu Hong 劉弘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Hong (劉弘)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Prefect of Fan in Dong commandery, he died young. Liu Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
